name: bar-assistant
description: MCP server for Bar Assistant cocktail management - search cocktails, manage your shelf, and explore recipes
long_description:
MCP server for Bar Assistant, a cocktail recipe and bar management application.

**Features:**
- Search and browse cocktails with detailed recipes
- Find cocktails you can make with your current ingredients
- Manage your shelf (ingredients you have)
- Track shopping lists
- Browse collections, tags, glasses, and methods

**Setup:**
1. Get your API token from Bar Assistant (Profile → Personal Access Tokens)
2. Configure the server URL and token in settings
3. Start exploring your cocktail collection!

BAR_ASSISTANT_URL.title: Bar Assistant API URL
BAR_ASSISTANT_URL.description: The base URL of your Bar Assistant API (e.g., https://erikbarapi.duckdns.org)

BAR_ASSISTANT_TOKEN.title: API Token
BAR_ASSISTANT_TOKEN.description: Personal Access Token from Bar Assistant (Profile → Personal Access Tokens)

tools.name: bar_get_cocktail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific cocktail

tools.name: bar_makeable_cocktails
tools.description: Get cocktails you can make with shelf ingredients

tools.name: bar_get_ingredient
tools.description: Get detailed information about an ingredient

tools.name: bar_ingredient_cocktails
tools.description: Get cocktails that use a specific ingredient

tools.name: bar_get_shelf
tools.description: Get ingredients on the user's shelf

tools.name: bar_add_to_shopping_list

tools.name: bar_get_collection
tools.description: Get a specific collection with its cocktails
